title: Bare Bones X Sully's Mod
description: Retextures Sully's Mod to fit in Bare Bone aesthetics
body:
**This is an unofficial texture pack for Sully's Mod for those who want to play Sully's Mod along with Bare Bones.**

**❗ It is required to use Sully's Mod and it's API to use this resource pack.**

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sullys-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sullys-mod)



**📝What is Sully's Mod?**
**Sully's Mod is a vanilla+ mod that adds various features to the game that blends within vanilla by making each mob unique.**



**CREDIT:**


[- @ModSully - Mod Owner](https://twitter.com/ModSully)

[- @Awaiiuu - Resource Pack Creator](https://twitter.com/awaiiuu)
